name: Governor Rick Perry
subject: Incredible Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perry for President, Inc
body:
| | **** Friend,
**
This has been an incredible month.** Week after week, crowds came out to hear my vision for America, shaped and tested in Texas. And at every stop, the crowds got bigger and bigger.

This is what it's like to build a movement. One based on principles - and one based on the kind of leadership that made Texas the economic engine of the United States. [**Join that movement today.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI5NTY0MjIS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDE0NDYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**Now, I need the resources to make July even bigger.** With the size and competitiveness of the field of candidates, we have to spread the message further and faster than we ever have before.

My team has done a lot - but I need my supporters to step up, too.

We've got to reach our June goal, and have just hours left to do that. [**Anything you can do before midnight TONIGHT goes towards making July and beyond even bigger.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI5NTY0MjIS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDE0NDYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you for your vigilance and our constant support.

Governor Rick Perry
**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI5NTY0MjIS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDE0NDYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI5NTY0MjIS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDE0NDYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**
---
Paid for by Perry for President, Inc.
| | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com This message reflects the opinions and representations of Perry for President, Inc.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Perry for President, Inc. click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ui/modules/display/optOut.jsp?&m=22956422&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&j=NjAwMDE0NDYxS0&mt=1&rt=0).
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22956422&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDE0NDYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

body:

name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Big announcement - a new record:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
We met our first deadline! I'm so excited about this. | Friend --

I am so excited to announce this, I couldn't wait one more minute:

In the first quarter of this campaign, we raised more than $45 million -- a new record for this early in a campaign.

That is huge. It's the result of hundreds of thousands of you stepping up to stand with Hillary from the very beginning. Many people doubted whether we could build an organization powered by so many grassroots supporters. Today's announcement proves them wrong.

We're still running the numbers, and we'll be in touch again soon to tell you a little more about the incredible group of people who've chipped in to support this campaign. Stay tuned for that.

But even as we celebrate this great news, we can't get complacent. Between now and July 15th, our opponents are required to announce their fundraising numbers, too. Some of the Republicans are rumored to have raised $100 million into their war chests, every penny of which they'll use to tear down our campaign and strengthen theirs. So we need to keep working.

To prepare ourselves against this kind of onslaught, we’re going to continue to do this the right way: by building a campaign with the broadest possible base of support, driven by people chipping in what they can, whether it's $1, $27, or $2,700. So I think it's fair to say you can expect a few more fundraising emails from me over the course of this campaign. But, at least for today, I hope you take a minute to appreciate a job well done. This is your campaign and your record.

Thank you. I’m so glad we’re doing this together.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

P.S. Hillary wanted to say thank you, too. Take a look at her note below:

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjI5NjEyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDcwNTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI5NjEyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDcwNTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just reply to this email with feedback -- we read everything, promise! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI5NjEyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDcwNTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI5NjEyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDcwNTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI5NjEyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDcwNTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjI5NjEyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDcwNTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI5NjEyMDgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwMDcwNTUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
|
---
| | Friend,

I want to give you a campaign update as we finish the quarter and approach the first debate. In less than 60 days since our campaign launch, we have held more than 25 fundraisers across the country and over 30 town halls to enthusiastic crowds in the key early states of Iowa and South Carolina. Our efforts are starting to pay off. A new national poll from CNN today shows my dad in the top 3 with Jeb Bush and Donald Trump, and polls in Iowa and South Carolina consistently show my dad as one of the most well liked candidates in the field.

[ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lk1pa2VIdWNrYWJlZS5jb20%2fcz00R1dMDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) We have no illusions, though - this is going to be a tough race. There are many good Republican candidates and Hillary Clinton is a formidable opponent. But many have made the mistake - including the Clintons and their political machine in Arkansas - of underestimating my dad before. No one should underestimate his ability to win this race. We have the best candidate, the best message, and the best team of loyal and committed supporters. With your help and continued support we can elect Mike Huckabee as our next president. The next big event on the calendar is the Fox News debate on August 6. The debates will be an opportunity for my dad to shine, just as he did in the 2008 debates, and really distinguish himself from the pack. Between now and then, we will continue to campaign aggressively in Iowa and South Carolina, as well as holding many more fundraisers. Just yesterday, we opened our Iowa headquarters and my dad will spend the rest of the week barnstorming the state. [

](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lk1pa2VIdWNrYWJlZS5jb20%2fcz00R1dMDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) Thank you for your help, prayers, and generous support. Onward to victory, Sarah Huckabee Sanders
Campaign Manager |
---|---|---

[ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlP3M9NEdXTA0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d)

[ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3LmZhY2Vib29rLmNvbS9taWtlaHVja2FiZWUNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t) [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9nb3ZtaWtlaHVja2FiZWUvDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vdHdpdHRlci5jb20vZ292bWlrZWh1Y2thYmVlDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL2NoYW5uZWwvVUM0dnJ0VDZyWXd1b2N5VUFxenc3RVJBDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5NzctYzEwOTk5M2QtYWE4Zi00NDhkLWI5MDMtOTNmOGE0MDkwMzc5DQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzYjY2ZjA2DQpodHRwOi8vcGx1cy5nb29nbGUuY29tL3UvMC8xMTQyNDg5MTg2NDQxNzUwMDU2NDcvYWJvdXQNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t)

We have no illusions, though - this is going to be a tough race. There are many good Republican candidates and Hillary Clinton is a formidable opponent. But many have made the mistake - including the Clintons and their political machine in Arkansas - of underestimating my dad before. No one should underestimate his ability to win this race. We have the best candidate, the best message, and the best team of loyal and committed supporters. With your help and continued support we can elect Mike Huckabee as our next president. The next big event on the calendar is the Fox News debate on August 6. The debates will be an opportunity for my dad to shine, just as he did in the 2008 debates, and really distinguish himself from the pack. Between now and then, we will continue to campaign aggressively in Iowa and South Carolina, as well as holding many more fundraisers. Just yesterday, we opened our Iowa headquarters and my dad will spend the rest of the week barnstorming the state. Thank you for your help, prayers, and generous support. Onward to victory, Sarah Huckabee Sanders Campaign Manager | ---|---|--- Paid for by Huckabee for President | | * This e-mail was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Mike Huckabee for President Huckabee for President PO Box 3357 Little Rock, AR 72203 Phone: 1-844-780-6785 Fax: N/A

name: George Pataki
subject: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
GOVERNOR GEORGE PATAKI
132 East 43rd Street #614
New York, NY 10017

July 1, 2015

Governor Jeb Bush
Ben Carson
Governor Chris Christie
Senator Ted Cruz
Carly Fiorina
Senator Lindsey Graham
Governor Mike Huckabee
Governor Bobby Jindal
Governor John Kasich
Senator Rand Paul
Governor Rick Perry
Senator Marco Rubio
Senator Rick Santorum
Governor Scott Walker

CC: Donald Trump

Dear Fellow Republican candidates for president,

"And some, I assume, are good people."

The last week of news coverage over the language used by Donald Trump
to describe Mexicans has left me and a lot of other sensible people
wondering what century we are living in.

One hundred years ago, when Irish immigrants were coming to America,
my grandmother among them, they were too often characterized as
"drunks." A few years later it was the Italian immigrants, my
grandfather among them, who were called "mobsters" or worse, "dagos."
This type of divisive rhetoric is just wrong. It was wrong 100 years
ago and it's wrong today.

Yet here we are in 2015 and a leading candidate for the GOP
nomination for president is calling Mexicans criminals, rapists and
drug dealers. This is unacceptable.

I understand we must secure our border and stop illegal immigration.
But I also understand that it's not some Mexicans who are good
people, it is the vast majority of Mexicans, who came here to work,
succeed and live the American Dream.

My fellow Republicans like to talk about how we have to appeal to the
Latino vote if we are going to win back the White House. They speak
some Spanish, boast about "telling it like it is," or counsel to not
be afraid to lose the primary to win the general - yet so far have
been silent when it comes to denouncing these sad and divisive
remarks.

The next President of the United States will represent all Americans.
We won't win by dividing Americans against one another and we
certainly can't govern effectively doing so. We must secure the
border, save American jobs, and have a leader in the White House
world leaders can respect.

But we also must have a leader in the White House all Americans can
respect, not just some.

As Donald Trump doubles down, I'm asking you to join me in standing
up. Stand up for our party, for the ideals that made America great,
and stand for the basic decency and integrity entitled to every
American, no matter their heritage or nationality.

Join me. Stand up now. Denounce his comments today.

Sincerely,

Governor George Pataki

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com

http://hosted.verticalresponse.com/1453469/7f1929aab8/545534651/ace65cf3c9/

If you no longer wish to receive these emails, please reply to this
message with "Unsubscribe" in the subject line or simply click on the
following link:

http://cts.vresp.com/u?7f1929aab8/ace65cf3c9/mlpftw

______________________________________________________________________
Click below to forward this email to a friend:
http://oi.vresp.com/f2af/v4/send_to_friend.html?ch=7f1929aab8&lid=545534651&ldh=ace65cf3c9

______________________________________________________________________
This message was sent by George Pataki

Pataki for President
132 East 43rd Street #614
New York, NY 10017
US
